summary: Iteration 35: Video streaming optimization testing complete. Backend Range request support verified (HTTP 206 with Content-Range). Frontend lazy loading with IntersectionObserver and preload='metadata' confirmed. Fixed edge case: Range request beyond file size now returns 416 instead of 500.

minor.issue: Cache-Control header 'public, max-age=86400' is overwritten by CDN/proxy to 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'. This is infrastructure behavior, not backend code issue.

critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx: Correctly implements IntersectionObserver lazy loading (lines 112-122) and preload='metadata' (line 147)
BalieHero.jsx: Correctly implements IntersectionObserver lazy loading (lines 63-73) and preload='metadata' (line 92)
server.py: Video endpoint (lines 2338-2406) correctly supports Range requests with HTTP 206 and Content-Range header
server.py: Fixed edge case - Range request beyond file size now returns 416 Range Not Satisfiable instead of 500
Video caching: First request downloads from Object Storage and caches to disk, subsequent requests served via FileResponse

success_rate.frontend: 100% (/sauny and /balie pages load correctly on mobile)

seed_data_creation: Created test video file: /app/backend/uploads/videos/test-vid.mp4 (50KB random data for Range request testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video streaming optimization is complete. Backend supports Range requests (HTTP 206) for progressive download. Frontend uses IntersectionObserver to lazy-load videos on mobile and preload='metadata' instead of 'auto'. Cache-Control headers are set by backend but may be overwritten by CDN layer. Test video at /api/videos/test-vid.mp4 can be used for Range request testing.

backend_range_request_206.details: GET /api/videos/{filename} with Range header returns HTTP 206 with Content-Range header

backend_full_file_accept_ranges.details: GET /api/videos/{filename} without Range returns full file with Accept-Ranges: bytes header

backend_range_middle_chunk.details: Range request for middle chunk (bytes=10000-19999) returns correct partial content

backend_range_end_of_file.details: Range request for end of file (bytes=50000-) returns correct partial content

backend_range_beyond_file_size.details: Range request beyond file size returns 416 Range Not Satisfiable (fixed from 500)

frontend_balie_hero_preload_metadata.details: BalieHero.jsx video element has preload='metadata' (line 92), verified on /balie page

frontend_hero_intersection_observer.details: Hero.jsx implements IntersectionObserver for lazy loading on mobile (lines 112-122)

frontend_balie_intersection_observer.details: BalieHero.jsx implements IntersectionObserver for lazy loading on mobile (lines 63-73)

frontend_sauny_mobile_load.details: /sauny page loads correctly on mobile viewport (390x844)

frontend_balie_mobile_load.details: /balie page loads correctly on mobile viewport (390x844) with video playing

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Video optimization was needed for mobile: 1) Backend was loading entire video into memory from Object Storage (no streaming), 2) Frontend was loading videos immediately with preload='auto'
fix_applied: Backend: Added disk caching for videos + Range request support (HTTP 206) for progressive streaming
Frontend: Changed preload='auto' to preload='metadata' + added IntersectionObserver to defer video loading on mobile until component is in viewport
Edge case fix: Range request beyond file size now returns 416 instead of 500
